title: Pipeline Lean Redesign — Context Engineering Overhaul

output.summary: Strategic — process-level change to pipeline context engineering. Research + gap analysis + CEO clarification before changes.
Read directive.md — 4 requirements: research best practices, internal gap analysis, CEO clarification, lean implementation.
Read vision.md, agent registry, previous pipeline-quality-and-trim directive (completed). No preferences.md found.
Challenge deferred — CEO clarification is built into this directive's R3.

External research (6 Anthropic + 2 OpenAI articles) + internal gap analysis (29K words, 40 files). Found 7 conflicts, 10 missing enforcement gates. Key insight: docs are 81% signal but enforcement is all in prose — agents skip gates that don't produce errors. CEO clarifying questions presented.
output.findings: Context rot confirmed — performance degrades 15-30% at 8K-16K instruction tokens. Harness engineering (mechanical enforcement) > context engineering (more docs). 3-7 examples > 20 rules.
